name: Job Job Job Sahur
description: Used for the Job Job Ritual.

name: Ferinsini Luckini
description: A Ferinsini Luckini with traits will activate the trait events for 5 minutes.

name: Present Rot
description: During the Christmas event, Present Rot has a 1% chance to be rolled.

name: Chocone Dragone
description: During Love events, a Chocone Dragone has a 30% chance to replace a Cannelloni Dragoni.

name: Love Rot
description: During Love Rot and Lucky Rot events, Love Rot has a 0.25% chance to be rolled.

name: Clove Clove Clove Sahur
description: 4% Chance of spawning upon activating a Ferinsini Luckini.

name: Trifoglita Bicicleta
description: 1% Chance of spawning upon activating a Ferinsini Luckini.

name: Koinobori Shogunelli
description: Collect 500 Carps in the Carp fish mini-game and claim it
